violations.text: ROP salmon was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. Salmon was observed at 36 DF and was taken out of packaging to thaw. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
The gasket for the 2 door reach-in was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
Both chest freezers were observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on both units. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Raw animal foods (such as) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in the two door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

Food items in the two door fridge were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair in the bar area and in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The tile floor behind the bar area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the two door true were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2023

The light in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The faucet over the three bay is in poor repair. All equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2023
